MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel, is present. Represented by Lauren Hall.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Katherine Wolfe, is present.
Attorney, Charles Huse , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Don Sullivan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
